title: Skills Table — Showcasing Abilities
description: Add a table in the About Me section that lists your skills. The table should have a header row (thead) with columns: Skill, Level, Years. Add a tbody with at least 3 rows of skills. Use th for header cells and td for data cells.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 5: Skills Table # Add a table to the About section with Skill, Level, Years columns. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

About Me | Projects | Contact

Welcome to my portfolio!

About Me

I am a developer who is passionate about building things. I am constantly learning and love problem-solving.

My Projects

Here are some of my recent projects.

Contact

Get in touch with me.

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '' in html.lower() and '
' in html.lower(), 'Must include a element' assert '' in html.lower() and '' in html.lower(), 'Must include for the header row' assert '' in html.lower() and '' in html.lower(), 'Must include for the data rows' assert '')[1].split('')[0] assert _tbody.count('') >= 3, f'Need at least 3 data rows in tbody, found {_tbody.count("")}'
' in html.lower(), 'Must include header cells' assert html.lower().count('') >= 3, f'Need at least 3 cells (Skill, Level, Years), found {html.lower().count("")}' assert '
' in html.lower(), 'Must include data cells' _tbody = html.lower().split('
acceptance_criteria: A table element is present in the About section
thead contains a row with at least 3 th cells
tbody contains at least 3 rows of skill data
Each data row uses td cells for values
hints: Put the table inside the About Me section div
